meaning: adj.无足轻重的,保管很差的,褴褛的
examples: I'd take my wife dancing. And go and play "footy" with my son.
Rugby, soccer and footy are all rough games and can lead to serious injuries.
Translators had been footy for a long time in China as well as in other countries.
The fans really deserve success while the players seem to be enjoying their footy a lot more.
It is the summer and as far the Aussies are concerned that is simply not footy season.
